credential_source: external environment only; values are not committed

scenarios.name: client_reconnect_persistence
scenarios.notes: A second client reads a non-TTL key written by the first client before cleanup.

scenarios.name: server_restart_recovery
scenarios.notes: External dev Redis restart is not performed by this env-gated test; local Docker restart path is documented in test/integration/README.md.

runtime: real Redis selected by REDISX_REDIS_* at test time
data_hygiene: test keys are nonce-prefixed and deleted during cleanup
